name: Playback Filters
overview: Client-side video filter presets for Jellyfin Web
description: Adds grouped movie, black-and-white, color, comfort, and fun filters to Jellyfin Web playback without forcing transcoding.

versions.changelog: Added Custom Filter Studio for creating, previewing, saving, applying, and deleting personal presets. Added Retro TV, VHS, Silent Film, Old Western, Security Camera, and Broken TV styles.
Moved the filter button beside Jellyfin's standard volume control for users without Sleep Timer. Added a public landing page and improved general client compatibility.
Initial public release with more than 30 grouped filters, Rainbow Shift, and playback-bar integration.
